homepage.title: PBSGroup
homepage.text_excerpt:
PBSGroup
PBS Engineering & Technology. No Limits.
PBS is a solutions-oriented, customer-focused technology group that combines a wide range of services, top-tier professionals, and cutting-edge products to offer customized systems and tools for organizations in the Caribbean, Central America, and South America.
Under the concept of “Engineering & Technology,” PBS operates through a model in which they work together to transform ideas into functional, scalable, and strategic solutions. Engineering acts as the core capability for designing, integrating, and executing complex systems with a long-term vision, while technology serves as the enabler that accelerates results and turns innovation into real impact.
This approach reinforces PBS as a reliable partner in solutions integration, focused on helping clients improvethe efficiency of their business processes while delivering measurable and sustainable results.
No Limits defines how PBS thinks and operates: without technical, geographical, or industry boundaries. It reflects a commitment to flexibility, continuous innovation, and the ability to anticipate and solve challenges through tailored solutions that drive efficiency and growth across diverse markets and industries.
Professional Services
We deliver integrated solutions for endpoint, asset, and system management, ensuring continuity, efficiency, and agile support, including L1 and L2 service desk.
Learn more
Learn more
Networking & Communication
Delivering integrated networking solutions that combine infrastructure, connectivity, and security to enable reliable, scalable, and adaptable communication environments.
Learn more
Learn more
Print & Imaging
Delivering comprehensive imaging solutions that integrate equipment, supplies, and communication management to enhance productivity, streamline workflows, and elevate customer engagement.
Learn more
Learn more
Payment Methods
Delivering end-to-end payment solutions that enable secure, efficient, and scalable financial operations.
Learn more
Learn more
Advanced Services
PBS Group delivers Advanced Services that drive technological transformation through scalable, engineering-led solutions, combining consulting, architecture, and system integration to optimize operations, boost efficiency, and enable innovation.
Learn more
Learn more
Information Technology
Delivering end-to-end IT solutions across hardware and software to optimize operations, boost productivity, and ensure reliable business performance.
Learn more
Learn more
Security Systems
Delivering integrated security solutions with advanced screening and identification technologies to ensure enhanced safety, control, and seamless operational continuity.
Learn more
Learn more
We represent the fastest,
the smartest, and the most reliable.
What’s new on PBS
Privacy Notice
This website uses cookies to ensure you get the best experience. By using our site, you acknowledge that you have read and understand our Privacy Notice for Jamaica.
Accept
